template: Fine-grained positional K-only sweep (10 decile bins + V control)
prediction_outcome: mixed — closest to Scenario B + elements of C
key_finding: K-direction perturbation at 10% dose saturates Llama accuracy at ~0% for ALL position bins (0-5.3%, bin 9 = 15.8%). Text accuracy shows clean linear gradient 9→94%. No Reasoning Horizon at 70-85%. K > V confirmed at bin 9 (+55pp gap).
evidence_impact: Extends K > V to Llama latest positions; positional dissociation partially replicates via text gradient; Reasoning Horizon connection disconfirmed; reveals Llama K-routing is more fragile/distributed than Qwen
next_planned: Reduced-dose (5%) fine-grained sweep to reveal accuracy gradient on Llama; or same experiment on Qwen-Base for cross-model comparison

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. Positional dissociation confirmed (text gradient).

positional_dissociation.status: Qwen-Base established. Llama: text gradient replicates (9→94%); accuracy saturated at 10% dose. No Reasoning Horizon.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL (5/5 models). Extended to Llama latest decile (+55pp). Now independently confirmed by AsymKV.

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. TC best protection metric.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE: 4 families, 5 training variants, GQA + MHA, Base + Instruct.

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY: Qwen-Base=DIGITAL, Qwen-Instruct=MIXED, Llama/Phi/Mistral=ANALOG. Llama more fragile/distributed.

literature_convergence.status: DECISIVE: 8+ angles, 45+ papers. Reasoning Horizon connection disconfirmed (linear, no phase transition).
